name: atassa-md
description: Atassa, a Multi Device Whatsapp Bot built by Gifted Tech to Enhance Whatsapp Communication Experience

MODE.description: Worktype of your bot. Use public or private, if it is private then only bot number can use it. If public then everyone can use it.

TIME_ZONE.description: Put TIME_ZONE according to your location

AUTO_READ_STATUS.description: Fill the value true if you want bot to automatically view your Statuses.

DATABASE_URL.description: Insert database URL if you have here.
